goal: Improve the toolbar editing UX in the timeline with clearer drag-and-drop placement feedback and a more informative toolbar manager.
constraints: Modify only src/renderer/src/components/Timeline.tsx unless a tiny adjacent type/import adjustment is strictly required.
Keep all existing toolbar behaviors working: lock/edit mode, drag reordering, separators, manager toggles, context menu, time/selection format menus.
Stay within the current dark blue Omega look and avoid broad redesign.
success_criteria: When dragging toolbar items or separators in edit mode, the intended insertion position is visually much clearer than before.
The toolbar manager communicates the purpose and current state more clearly than before, while preserving the existing visibility toggles.
The implementation remains scoped and consistent with the existing Timeline.tsx patterns.
